mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message m INNER JOIN sys_message_receiver r ON m.message_id = r.message_id WHERE r.receiver_id = #{userId} AND r.is_read = 0 AND m.del_flag = 0
AND m.msg_type = #{msgType}

SELECT m.message_id, m.title, m.content, m.msg_type, m.priority, m.sender_name, m.create_time, COALESCE(r.is_read, 0) AS is_read, r.read_time FROM sys_message m LEFT JOIN sys_message_receiver r ON m.message_id = r.message_id AND r.receiver_id = #{userId} WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND (
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys_message_receiver r3 WHERE r3.message_id = m.message_id AND r3.receiver_id = #{userId})
OR (m.send_scope = 'ALL' AND m.msg_type != 2) ) LIMIT 1
